overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a character in a white hooded robe exploring the interior of a Gothic castle. The character walks through candle-lit corridors, ascends a spiral staircase, crosses a grand hall, climbs the Faculty Tower stairs, and enters an upper chamber. The environment features stone vaulted ceilings, wooden paneling, portraits, and other student NPCs in dark robes.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with benches and portraits

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor, passing students seated on benches along the walls

notable_agents.action: two students in dark robes sitting on a bench conversing

entered.detail: stone Gothic arches forming the corridor ceiling with ribbed vaulting
dark wood paneling lining the corridor walls with decorative moldings
lit wall-mounted lanterns providing warm amber illumination
portraits in gilded frames hanging on the wooden walls
wooden benches along the walls where students sit

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long, narrow castle corridor with high vaulted ceilings and dark wooden paneling. Warm light from wall-mounted lanterns illuminates the space, while students in dark robes sit on benches along the right wall, conversing.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone spiral staircase with lattice windows

events.description: character turns right and enters a narrow stone spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the tight spiral staircase, moving upward in a circular motion

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the spiral staircase

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with worn steps curving upward
tall narrow windows with diamond-patterned leaded glass panes

segments.scene_description: The character enters a tight stone spiral staircase, ascending the curved steps. A student descends past them on the left, while blue light filters through tall lattice windows on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with circular floor mosaic and stone columns

events.description: exits spiral staircase into a large open hall with ornate circular floor pattern

agents.ego_description: walking across the great hall toward an arched doorway, navigating around groups of students

notable_agents.action: group of students standing and conversing near the wall

entered.detail: large circular patterned stone floor with geometric designs
thick cylindrical stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
tall Gothic archways leading to other corridors and the Faculty Tower
ornate iron lanterns suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the spiral stairs, the character enters a spacious grand hall with a prominent circular floor mosaic. Stone pillars line the left side while students gather in small groups. The character heads toward a distant arched doorway marked as Faculty Tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: Faculty Tower stairwell with carpeted stairs and portrait gallery

events.description: enters the Faculty Tower through wooden doors and begins ascending the carpeted staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the long carpeted staircase of the Faculty Tower, passing numerous portraits on the walls

entered.detail: ornate wooden double doors with glass panels marking the tower entrance
wide staircase with red patterned carpet runner covering the stone steps
numerous framed portraits of historical figures lining the stairwell walls
carved wooden banisters with decorative posts along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Faculty Tower and ascends a long, carpeted staircase. The walls are lined with a gallery of portraits in gilded frames, and warm light from wall sconces illuminates the wooden paneling as the character climbs steadily upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper chamber with large display cabinet

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters a small room with a large display cabinet

agents.ego_description: walking into the upper room and approaching the large wooden cabinet at the far end

entered.detail: large dark wooden cabinet with glass doors containing various objects and artifacts
blue carpet covering the floor of the upper room

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the Faculty Tower stairs, the character enters a small, quiet chamber with blue carpet. A large, ornate display cabinet stands against the far wall, filled with various objects visible through its glass doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a Gothic castle, moving from narrow, candle-lit corridors into the expansive heights of a faculty tower. It begins by following a character in a white robe through a vaulted hallway lined with dark wooden paneling and conversing students, before transitioning into a tight stone spiral staircase where cool blue light filters through lattice windows. As the character emerges from the stairs, the space opens into a grand hall featuring a circular floor mosaic and stone pillars, leading the camera toward a distant arched doorway. The scene then shifts upward as the character ascends a long, carpeted staircase flanked by gilded portraits and warm wall sconces, finally entering a quiet, blue-carpeted chamber containing a large, ornate display cabinet.
